because.AR-S1: engine rule AR-S1: it has been {{days}} days since {{last}} — restarting a notch lighter to rebuild momentum.
because.AR-D1: engine rule AR-D1: last time was {{last}} — below the {{repsLow}}–{{repsHigh}} rep target, so about 2.5% comes off to win the reps back.
because.AR-R1: engine rule AR-R1: {{last}} was harder than the plan calls for — same load again until it sits in the target effort band.
because.AR-P1: engine rule AR-P1: you hit {{last}} — top of the rep range with room to spare, so one increment goes on.
because.AR-H1: engine rule AR-H1: {{last}} sits inside the target band — same load, keep stacking quality sets.
because.AR-H1_bodyweight: engine rule AR-H1: bodyweight movement — progress by adding reps past {{reps}} before adding load.
because.FT-D1_deload: engine rule FT-D1: readiness has averaged {{mean}} over the last 7 days ({{days}} scored days, threshold {{threshold}}) and your last deload was {{weeks}} weeks ago — consider pulling your deload forward.
because.FT-D1_nodeload: engine rule FT-D1: readiness has averaged {{mean}} over the last 7 days ({{days}} scored days, threshold {{threshold}}) and no deload is on record — consider pulling your deload forward.
because.FT-V1: engine rule FT-V1: your last {{count}} readiness scores ({{scores}}) are all under {{threshold}} — consider trimming accessory volume about {{trimPct}}% next session.
